config.html:
Scaffold từ DQHF — form gốc: frmPhieuDeNghiThanhToanAdd
Nút WinForms gốc: Lưu · Thoát · Duyệt đề xuất
Nút cần gắn thêm: Xoá (procedure/records.delete) · In (cần print template entity) · Xuất (export)
Proc cần port: TR_DANHSACH_DEXUAT_PROCESS_INSERT, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_DUYET, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_FILE_DELETE, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_FILE_GET, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_FILE_GETLIST, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_FILE_INSERT, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_FILE_UPDATE, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_GET, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_INSERT, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_NHACC, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_NHACC_GET, TR_DENGHI_THANHTOAN_UPDATE, TR_DONDATHANG_GETBYSTATUS, TR_DONDATHANG_GET_THANHTOAN, TR_NHOM_DEXUAT2_GET, TR_QUYTRINH_XETDUYET_GETALL, tr_dondathang_tienthanhtoan_Get, tr_dondathang_tienthanhtoan_Update
Entity phụ (lookup/filter cân nhắc thêm): tr_denghi_thanhtoan, tr_dexuat_bangmau, tr_dondathang, tr_dondathang_chitiet, tr_hehang, tr_khachhang, tr_material, tr_order, tr_order_replacement, tr_phieuyeucau, tr_phieuyeucau_chitiet, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang, tr_phieuyeucau_muahang_chitiet, tr_site
